title: Plushys Mod
description: A simple mod that adds several placeable and interactive plushies to use as gacha items... or to put in vases 💀
body:
**PlushysMod** is a mod for Minecraft that adds collectible and interactive plushies to your world, each with unique designs, custom sounds, and different levels of rarity.

The mod focuses on the decoration, collection, and personality of each plushie, offering everything from common plushies to more special and hard-to-find epic versions. When you interact with them, the plushies play unique sounds that bring them to life and make each one feel different.

### Characteristics:

- Multiple unique plush toys.
- Interactive sounds.
- Rarity system (Common and Epic).
- Custom models and textures.
- Minecraft 1.21.1 Compatibility.
- New content and sounds coming in future updates.

Whether it's to decorate your base, create a collection, or simply fill your world with adorable little companions, PlushysMod aims to add more charm and personality to the Minecraft experience.
